return(function(Q,u,a,T,x,k,W,e,b,s,r,o,Y,j,P,v,D,Z,q,U,p,y,L)L,v,j,o,D,P,y,r,Z,e,Y,b,p,s,q,U=function(Q)y[Q]=y[Q]-(320542+-320541)if y[Q]==38811+-38811 then y[Q],P[Q]=nil,nil end end,function(Q)for end end end end end end end end D=#x return u(W)end,{},{},-222518+222518,function()r=(674482-674481)+r y[r]=879843+-879842 return r end,function(Q,R)local u=v(R)local a=function(a,T)return D(Q,{a,T},R,u)end return a end,function(Q,R)local u=v(R)local a=function()return D(Q,{},R,u)end return a end,function(Q,R)local u=v(R)local a=function(a,T,x,k,W,P)return D(Q,{a;T;x,k;W;P},R,u)end
